name: chatgpt-sidecar
description: Native Windows ChatGPT companion dock with explicit Codex thread selection and safe local context packaging.

interface.shortDescription: Dock ChatGPT beside Codex with selected local context
interface.longDescription: Sidecar Dock is a native Windows companion app that magnetically attaches to the Codex desktop window, hosts a persistent ChatGPT session, lets the user choose a saved root Codex thread, gathers bounded Git and referenced-file context locally, redacts common credentials, and prepares that context for user-reviewed sending without submitting another Codex prompt.
defaultPrompt: Open the ChatGPT Sidecar Dock installation instructions.
Explain how the native Sidecar Dock works beside Codex.
